narrative:
Lima 5B (precinct in Allen County) has 492 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.8 percentage points.
